violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered/licensed with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Application for Certified Food Safety Manager printed for PIC at the time of inspection. Application to be submitted as soon as possible. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024

ONE Buffalo Chicken Roller was observed held at (130) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated precook process chicken to 136 degrees Fahrenheit at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

Observed the outside dumpster not covered/closed. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered/closed. PIC closed dumpster. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

Observed the coving in the (dry storage) area behind front desk is in poor repair. Observed part of coving coming off the wall and some tiles crack/broken on sales floor. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered/licensed with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Application for Certified Food Safety Manager printed for PIC at the time of inspection. Application to be submitted as soon as possible. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024

At the time of inspection, unpackaged baked pastry items were observed set for sale as customer self-service without any ingredient information available for customer viewing. A list of ingredients/allergen information is to be available for customer viewing for the unpackaged food items held for customer self-selection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
The Gasket to the Walk-In Cooler door was observed to be torn and not in good repair. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

At the time of inspection, the facility was lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips to properly test the sanitizer solution at the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

The non-food-contact surfaces of the refrigeration surfaces and the shelving in the milk storage rack in the walk-in cooler were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Cheese and ham was observed held at 42-43 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was moved to walk-in unit. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023

Baked goods that are available for self service are lacking labels/ingredient information. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC stated that the DM will be contacted in regards to ingredient information. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023

The Lowboy unit used for thawing ingredients was observed iced over with an ambient temperature of 45 degrees. Unit was taken out of service. Service order to be placed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023
An accumulation of debris was observed underneath and behind the dumpster. Area shall be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023
